Appearances:
Plaintiff Arec 8th & Harriosn LLC is present. Represented by Mike Rojos.
Attorney Daniel Riley for the plaintiff.
Defendant Cesaire Labrie is present.
Attorney Ana Denmark appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of Apr-02-2018 is vacated. (501)
